items.toString: This work item relates to PDT-3000
This work item is cloned by PDT-2999

items.fromString:
PODs in Request for disconnection should be filtered by the folluwing rules:

* If Supplier type is *Current*, then only PODs which are *active* in current date in the contract of the customer (customer ID), included in the reminder, should be listed.
* If Supplier type is *Previous*, then only PODs which are *not active* in current date in the contract of the customer (customer ID), included in the reminder, should be listed.
items.toString:
PODs in Request for disconnection should be filtered by the folluwing rules:

* If Supplier type is *Current*, then only PODs which are *active* in current date in the contract of the customer (customer ID), included in the reminder, should be listed.
* If Supplier type is *Previous*, then only PODs which are *not active* in current date in the contract of the customer (customer ID), included in the reminder, should be listed.

Keep already existing Requests for Disconnection untouched.

Hello, Dobromir. What should happen to already existing Request for Disconnection records? Or should we apply this change only to those created after the change?
I think we should apply the change only for the new ones.
